coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 7:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/5. 8:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/5. 8:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 8:00 at 95-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 60%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 60% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 60% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 20 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/5. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2: 8:00 at 100%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 2/5.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/5. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/5. 44 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 60%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/5. 60% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 60% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 31 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 33 minutes in. 100% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 60% for 5:00. Then 26min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41 minutes of work done. 26 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 26 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 46 minutes of threshold work done. Block 4/5. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 4/5. 63% complete. Hold 100% steady. 18 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 46 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 46 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 63% complete. 100% for 8:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% done. 0 intervals left. 13 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 32min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 74% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 8:00 at 100%. Then 5min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-100% FTP, 95-105 rpm. After this: 5min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 8:00 at 100%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 8:00 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 67 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 67 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 92% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
